title: fagelia viscosissima
intro: Fagelia viscosissima, also known as sticky broom, is a shrub-like plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Fagelia viscosissima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Fagelia viscosissima can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
